justification: The diff only updates the Spring Boot parent version (2.2.6 -> 3.3.13) and Java version (1.8 -> 21) in pom.xml, and removes the junit-vintage-engine exclusion. It does not demonstrate any Java 21 idioms (records, pattern matching, virtual threads, etc.) in the code. The removal of the vintage engine exclusion is appropriate for Spring Boot 3, but the lack of actual code migration limits the score.
